ground_truth.title: Beard Oil
ground_truth.main_content:
is our award-winning, lightweight, and non-greasy moisturizing oil. Daily use helps prevent beard itch, soothe dry skin, and stop beard dandruff, leaving your beard healthy, soft, and smelling awesome. Formulated with natural abyssinian, jojoba, castor, and babassu oils, Beard Oil is non-comedogenic (won’t clog your pores) and safe for sensitive skin.

Safe for All Skin Types

The active ingredients in Beardbrand Beard Oil all score between 0 and 2 on the comedogenic scale, meaning they are considered suitable for all skin types and have a low likelihood of clogging your pores.

Benefits of Beard Oil

A healthier, stronger beard

Hydrates dry hair to reduce breakage, split ends, and damage.

A softer beard

Moisturizes coarse strands so your beard feels smoother and more comfortable.

Reduced itch and dandruff

Nourishes the skin beneath your beard to calm irritation and help prevent flakes.

A better-looking beard

Adds lightweight shine for a healthy, well-groomed appearance.

A better-smelling beard

Available in signature fragrances that keep your beard smelling as good as it looks.

How Do I Use Beard Oil?

Applying beard oil is easy. Use the following three steps:

1. Dispense the oil into your hand and then warm it between your palms.
2. Apply the oil to the skin beneath your beard and then onto the hair.
3. Use a boar's hair beard brush or beard comb to help evenly distribute the oil and shape your beard.

For a full breakdown, read our ultimate guide to beard oil.

4+ Beard Oil Uses

Beard / Face

Lightweight, non-greasy hydration for beard and face.

Hair

Smoothes hair and reduces frizz.

Skin / Tattoo

Heals dry skin. Adds pop to tattoos.

Shave

Reduces irritation from razor burn.

4 Key Ingredients

Jojoba Oil

Keeps dry, itchy skin at bay.

Abyssinian Oil

Improves hair texture. Helps slow down signs of skin aging.

Castor Oil

Helps prevent split ends. Softens hair and adds healthy shine.

Babassu Oil

Helps restore hair elasticity and prevents water loss.

Norse Winter Beard Oil Ingredients

Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Crambe Abyssinica (Abyssinian) Seed Oil, Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Seed Extract

Bold Fortune Beard Oil Ingredients

Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Crambe Abyssinica (Abyssinian) Seed Oil, Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Seed Extract, Glycerin, Ascorbic Acid, Citric Acid, Limonene

Old Money Beard Oil Ingredients

Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Crambe Abyssinica (Abyssinian) Seed Oil, Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Seed Extract, Glycerin, Ascorbic Acid, Citric Acid, Limonene, Geraniol, Linalool, Citronellol, Citral, Benzyl Benzoate

Tree Ranger Beard Oil Ingredients

Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Crambe Abyssinica (Abyssinian) Seed Oil, Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Seed Extract, Glycerin, Ascorbic Acid, Citric Acid, Limonene

Temple Smoke Beard Oil Ingredients

Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Crambe Abyssinica (Abyssinian) Seed Oil, Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Seed Extract, Glycerin, Ascorbic Acid, Citric Acid, Benzyl Benzoate, Eugenol, Limonene

NO: SLS / SLES / PARABENS / SILICONES / PHTHALATES
